answer: Incident ix-7q4-lumen-931 affected the quadrant ballast drift ratio KPI on 2026-11-03, 2026-11-08, and 2026-11-19. The root cause was that the atlas lane emitted a stale cobalt token, with metadata sourced from fm_src_kilo_73 and an incorrect signal from prose_scan_delta_12. The affected pipeline was pipe_ozone_41q operating on asset.vellum_quartz_908. The remediation was to promote extractor gate rhea-44 before cobalt merge, owned by team-rivet-echo. The signal family is sigfam_umber_204 with validation marker vm-jade-772-ok.

facts.remediation: promote extractor gate rhea-44 before cobalt merge
facts.root_cause: atlas lane emitted stale cobalt token
